widget.convert: {"template": [ MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaBlend(pos = (20, 5), size = (70, 70), png = 0), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (110, 20), size = (150, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 1, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (280, 20), size = (150, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 2, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (450, 20), size = (750, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 3, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (1220, 20), size = (220, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 4, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaBlend(pos = (1450, 20), size = (30, 30), png = 5), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (1485, 20), size = (200, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 6, color = 0xffffff, color_sel = 0xffffff), ], "fonts": [gFont("Regular", 28)], "itemHeight": 80 }
